creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #15)

I believe so. I tracked the problem from 14 to 15-CURRENT, so the issue in my case, was restored with Colin's commits to 15-CURRENT; system has been running great since. If I read the releng/14 branch log (https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/sys/kern/init_main.c?h=releng/14.0) correctly, all the commits related to sorting, and storing the SYSINT boot order are there, so 14 should be OK too?
